message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query mission (#1137)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-2813-datadog-v2-api-fails-when-using-formulas-in-query",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query",
+    "description": "Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query. This issue affects 21+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-rollouts troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-rollouts deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `received non 2xx response code: 400 {\\\"errors\\\":[\\\"Functions are not supported in metrics data source field. Use the for`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts\n```\nChecklist:\r\r\n\nUsing formulas in AnalysisTemplate with Datadog v2 API fails with API error \n\n```received non 2xx response code: 400 {\"errors\":[\"Functions are not supported in metrics data source field."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query",
+        "description": "Add support for Datadog v2 api. \nAdd new properties `queries` and `formula`.\nUpdate the docs with some more examples, more details around v2.\n\nUpdate CRDs to express validation requirements, allowing us to remove some guardrails in the code. \n\nRationale:\ngiven the validation at the heart of k8s objects is held to a high standard\ngiven the context the analysis Runs exec is k8s\ngiven the the Analysis Template has a defined spec\n\neg: we can then make some assumptions\napiVersion _is_ empty, v1, v2\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `received non 2xx response code: 400 {\\\"errors\\\":[\\\"Functions are not supported in metrics data source field. Use the for` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add support for Datadog v2 api. \nAdd new properties `queries` and `formula`.\nUpdate the docs with some more examples, more details around v2.\n\nUpdate CRDs to express validation requirements, allowing us to remove some guardrails in the code.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
